name: BB:UBA : Data Loss Categories
notes: Building block to detect data loss based on QRadar event category.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Data Loss Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event category for the event is one of the following Risk.Data Loss Possible, Policy.Data Loss Prevention Policy Violation
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Data Loss Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Risk.Data Loss Possible, Policy.Data Loss Prevention Policy Violation
